from typing import Dict, Iterable, List

        metadata["quality_note"] = "preserve source title section chunk_id for retrieval"
        output.append(
            ChunkRecord(
                chunk_id=record.chunk_id,
                source=record.source,
                title=record.title,
                section=record.section,
                text=record.text,
                metadata=metadata,
            )
        )
    return output
